description: Canonical 9-reason enum for doc-coverage N/A declarations. Validator rejects unknown reasons.

out-of-scope.description: This ticket's change does not touch the area this surface covers
out-of-scope.evidence_implied: Change diff contains no files in the surface's directory
out-of-scope.abuse_prevention: Reviewer must verify diff has zero overlap with surface path
out-of-scope.validator_check: warn if diff contains path matching surface pattern

covered-by-sibling-pr.description: A concurrent PR (cite #N) updates this surface as part of the same feature
covered-by-sibling-pr.evidence_implied: Sibling PR number must appear in the reason string: covered-by-sibling-pr:#N
covered-by-sibling-pr.abuse_prevention: Sibling PR must be open or merged at close time; validator checks format

docs-only-no-functional-change.description: This PR updates documentation only; the surface tracks behavior not docs
docs-only-no-functional-change.evidence_implied: All changed files are .md, .txt, or docs/
docs-only-no-functional-change.abuse_prevention: Reject if any changed file is .js, .ts, .py, .sh, .yml workflow
docs-only-no-functional-change.validator_check: check diff for non-doc file types

no-user-visible-change.description: Internal refactor with no externally observable behavior change
no-user-visible-change.evidence_implied: No public API, CLI flag, config key, or UX change
no-user-visible-change.abuse_prevention: Cannot be combined with area:governance or area:instructions
no-user-visible-change.validator_check: reject if labels include area:governance or area:instructions

covered-by-parent-epic.description: The parent Epic's doc PR or a sibling child ticket covers this surface
covered-by-parent-epic.evidence_implied: Epic must have an open doc-update child ticket or closed one
covered-by-parent-epic.abuse_prevention: Epic number or ticket number must be cited
covered-by-parent-epic.validator_check: warn if no epic or ticket reference found in reason

test-only-change.description: This PR adds or modifies tests only; surface is not a test file
test-only-change.evidence_implied: All changed files are in tests/ or *.spec.js / *.test.js
test-only-change.abuse_prevention: Reject if any changed file is outside tests/ and not a fixture
test-only-change.validator_check: check diff for non-test file types

config-only-no-behavior-change.description: Config value adjustment with no behavior change (e.g., timeout tweak)
config-only-no-behavior-change.evidence_implied: Changed file is in config/ and no code or doc depends on the changed key
config-only-no-behavior-change.abuse_prevention: Cannot be used for new config keys or key removals
config-only-no-behavior-change.validator_check: advisory: confirm change is value-only, not key addition/removal

trivial-rename.description: File or symbol rename with no semantic change; surface will be updated by rename automation
trivial-rename.evidence_implied: git log shows rename only (R100); no content change
trivial-rename.abuse_prevention: Reject if diff shows content lines added/removed beyond path strings

external-dependency-update.description: Dependency version bump only (package.json, requirements.txt, etc.)
external-dependency-update.abuse_prevention: Cannot be used if the dependency update changes a public interface
external-dependency-update.validator_check: warn if diff includes non-lockfile changes
